title: Production, Planning, and Expediting Clerks
description: Coordinate and expedite the flow of work and materials within or between departments of an establishment according to production schedule. Duties include reviewing and distributing production, work, and shipment schedules; conferring with department supervisors to determine progress of work and completion dates; and compiling reports on progress of work, inventory levels, costs, and production problems.

tasks.text: Distribute production schedules or work orders to departments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Revise production schedules when required due to design changes, labor or material shortages, backlogs, or other interruptions, collaborating with management, marketing, sales, production, or engineering.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review documents, such as production schedules, work orders, or staffing tables, to determine personnel or materials requirements or material priorities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Arrange for delivery, assembly, or distribution of supplies or parts to expedite flow of materials and meet production schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with establishment personnel, vendors, or customers to coordinate production or shipping activities and to resolve complaints or eliminate delays.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Requisition and maintain inventories of materials or supplies necessary to meet production demands.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with department supervisors or other personnel to assess progress and discuss needed changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan production commitments or timetables for business units, specific programs, or jobs, using sales forecasts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile information, such as production rates and progress, materials inventories, materials used, or customer information, so that status reports can be completed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine documents, materials, or products and monitor work processes to assess completeness, accuracy, and conformance to standards and specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Compile and prepare documentation related to production sequences, transportation, personnel schedules, or purchase, maintenance, or repair orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate figures, such as required amounts of labor or materials, manufacturing costs, or wages, using pricing schedules, adding machines, calculators, or computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contact suppliers to verify shipment details.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record production data, including volume produced, consumption of raw materials, or quality control measures.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Establish and prepare product construction directions and locations and information on required tools, materials, equipment, numbers of workers needed, and cost projections.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain files, such as maintenance records, bills of lading, or cost reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Provide documentation and information to account for delays, difficulties, or changes to cost estimates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
